sourcesContent:
// src/editable.props.ts
import { createProps } from "@zag-js/types";
import { createSplitProps } from "@zag-js/utils";
var props = createProps()([
  "activationMode",
  "autoResize",
  "dir",
  "disabled",
  "finalFocusEl",
  "form",
  "getRootNode",
  "id",
  "ids",
  "invalid",
  "maxLength",
  "name",
  "onEditChange",
  "onFocusOutside",
  "onInteractOutside",
  "onPointerDownOutside",
  "onValueChange",
  "onValueCommit",
  "onValueRevert",
  "placeholder",
  "readOnly",
  "required",
  "selectOnFocus",
  "edit",
  "defaultEdit",
  "submitMode",
  "translations",
  "defaultValue",
  "value"
]);
var splitProps = createSplitProps(props);
export {
  props,
  splitProps
};
